author: porameht
body:
## Objective
this change adds support for the "openrouter – claude 4 sonnet" and "openrouter – claude 4 opus" models by defining their model ids and configurations, enabling the application to utilize these models via the openrouter provider.

## Change logs
*   Adds `OpenRouterClaude4Sonnet` model ID.
*   Adds `OpenRouterClaude4Opus` model ID.
*   Defines and configures the `OpenRouterClaude4Sonnet` model.
*   Defines and configures the `OpenRouterClaude4Opus` model.
title: feat: add claude 4 sonnet/opus to openrouter models
